name: Gene McDaniels
abstract: Eugene Booker McDaniels (February 12, 1935 – July 29, 2011) was an American singer, producer and songwriter. He had his greatest recording success in the early 1960s, reaching number three on the U.S.

about_quotes.speaker: Ron Carter
about_quotes.evidence: Gene McDaniels called The Outlaw. Subsequently, he has his own little label so I did some records with him.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ron Carter — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Bobby Hutcherson
about_quotes.evidence: We had Gene McDaniels. Gene was writing all this stuff. I wrote a tune for Albert Stinson.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bobby Hutcherson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
